images.quality_assessment: Fair image quality signals. 38 total images provided, but alt_texts show only 19 descriptive entries. Many alt texts are generic ('Daily Views Icon', 'Wifi', 'Takes Reservations') rather than product-focused. Primary image and treatment-related alt texts are present, but cross-promotional competitor treatment alt texts (HydroFacial, IPL Photofacials, Carbon Laser) dilute focus from core offering.

reviews.text: Nikita was very professional and told me every step during microneedling and after care . I can't wait to see the results.
reviews.author: Pattama

reviews.text:
Nikita service is more than a 5 stars, she took her time and explained everything steps by steps.
Great service.
reviews.author: MILDRED

reviews.text: Nikita is an amazing aesthetician and made my first time micro needling a breeze!! She was extremely thorough when it came to explaining the process during the procedure & was insightful about aftercare. I can't wait for my next appointment & explore her other treatments for future visits. Read More
reviews.author: Deidra

reviews.text: I would give more than 5 stars.  I got micro needling for the first time  and Nikita was beyond professional.  It exceeded my expectations.  1000% going back
reviews.author: brian

reviews.text: Highly recommend coming here for microneedling. Nikita was very sweet and explained the process with each step. I was a bit nervous, but it was painless. She numbs you for 20 minutes and then microneedles for about 10-15 minutes. My skin looks great and feels so soft. Will be back again. Read More
reviews.author: Keren
